basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) has officially announced the Research Associate Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates who are not more than 35 years of age and hold a PhD in Chemical Engineering, Chemical Technology, allied branches, or Chemistry can submit their applications through Email on or before 25-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Chemical Engineering/ Chemical Technology/ allied branches/ Chemistry
qualification.details: PhD degree in Chemical Engineering/ Chemical Technology/ allied branches/ Chemistry with good number of publications in reputed journals. At least 60% marks (or 6.5 CGPA) (55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST) in all qualified degrees. Experience in material synthesis and handling different projects.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Ropar Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Research Associate Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Ropar Research Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PhD degree in Chemical Engineering/ Chemical Technology/ allied branches/ Chemistry with good number of publications in reputed journals. At least 60% marks (or 6.5 CGPA) (55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST) in all qualified degrees. Experience in material synthesis and handling different projects.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Research Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate position at IIT Ropar is 25-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a PhD degree in Chemical Engineering, Chemical Technology, allied branches, or Chemistry to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate job at IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC/SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q9. What are the minimum marks required in the qualifying degrees?
faq.answer: A minimum of 60% marks (or 6.5 CGPA) is required, with a relaxation to 55% (or 6.0 CGPA) for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Ropar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is located in Rupnagar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001.
